statement: In every magma, Equation 1808 (`x = (y * z) * ((w * x) * z)`) implies Equation 3695 (`x * x = (y * z) * (x * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0260
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op w x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op y z) (op x y))
